Create a test document at app/agents/librarian/test-doc.md for testing the librarian agent. The document should be a moderately long (~400-500 words) technical article about "The History and Architecture of YAPOC" — make up plausible details about it being a multi-agent system with a master agent, planning agent, builder agent, keeper agent, cron agent, doctor agent, and librarian agent. Include details about how agents communicate, what tools they use, and the overall architecture. Format it as a proper markdown document with headings and sections.
